title: Section 11F
content: 1[11F. Sale, etc., of notified goods to be evidenced by vouchers.--On and from the notified date, no person shall sell or otherwise transfer any notified goods, unless every transaction in relation to the sale or transfer of such goods is evidenced by a voucher in such form and containing such particulars as may be specified by rules made in this behalf.]
footnote: 1. Chapters IVA, IVB and IVC ins. by Act 12 of 1969, s. 2 (w.e.f. 3-1-1969).
